title: Model pricing
subtitle: Configure per-channel, per-model prices in USD per 1M tokens. Only models with an input and output price can be requested.

hint.unit: Values are USD per 1,000,000 tokens (e.g. 3.00 = $3 / 1M). Input and output are required; cache prices are optional.
hint.selectChannel: Select a channel to configure its model prices.
hint.noModels: This channel has no models. Add models on the Channels page (or fetch them) first.

toast.inputOutputRequired: Input and output prices are required and must be greater than 0
